# Talvorax

> The Ultimate AI Career Tools to Land Your Dream Job.

Talvorax is a SaaS platform that helps candidates prepare for job applications using advanced AI.
Our tools are designed to help you beat Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS), ace your interviews, and automate your job search at scale.

## Core Features

- **Resume Analyzer**: Instantly detect missing ATS keywords and get AI-driven bullet point rewrites to optimize your resume and land more interviews.
- **Interview Coach**: Take hyper-realistic mock interviews with live feedback on the STAR method to conquer behavioral and technical interviews.
- **Minute Talk**: A speaking practice AI that eliminates filler words and helps you master your pacing before the big day.
- **Auto Apply**: Automatically apply to jobs that match your resume. Our AI co-pilot handles submissions and tracks applications in the background.
- **Communication Skills**: Get real-time AI feedback on your tone, pacing, and clarity to speak with absolute confidence in any interview or presentation.
- **Job Alerts**: Get notified instantly when jobs matching your exact skills and resume profile are posted on major job boards.

## All Pages & Tools

- Home: https://www.talvorax.com/
- Resume Analyzer: https://www.talvorax.com/resume-analyzer
- Interview Coach: https://www.talvorax.com/interview-coach
- Minute Talk (Speaking Practice): https://www.talvorax.com/minute-talk
- Auto Apply: https://www.talvorax.com/auto-apply
- Communication Skills: https://www.talvorax.com/communication-skills
- Job Alerts: https://www.talvorax.com/job-alerts
- Upskill Platform: https://www.talvorax.com/upskill
- Pricing: https://www.talvorax.com/pricing
- About: https://www.talvorax.com/about
- Contact: https://www.talvorax.com/contact

## Pricing

- Free Plan: $0/forever — Basic resume analysis (3/month), Minute Talk practice, standard job alerts.
- Pro Plan: $19/month — Unlimited resume analysis, advanced interview coaching (all roles), auto-apply integration, priority support.

## Target Audience

Job seekers, software engineers, marketing managers, product managers, and any candidates looking to optimize their recruitment funnel, beat ATS systems, and land their next job faster using AI-powered career tools.
